# B2B Discount Tier

## Definition

A B2B discount tier is a volume-based price break for Larkstead wholesale buyers. Tier one starts at 50 units and takes 12 percent off list price; tier two starts at 200 units and takes 18 percent off.

## Notes

Tier assignment is recalculated quarterly from trailing order volume, so a buyer who slips under a threshold keeps the better tier for one more quarter.
